title: デビュー戦の後に・宵の狭間に

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after finishing her debut race, Mejiro
Ardan senses the signs of a new beginning for
herself, only to collapse from exhaustion
moments later.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although a medical examination finds no
significant issues with her health, Mejiro Ardan is
taken to the Mejiro family's rest house to
recuperate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reason for her collapse is determined to be
the simultaneous post-race manifestation of
accumulated stress and fatigue.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro family's chief physician advises that
she withdraw from racing and recuperate for the
time being.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Mejiro Ardan's trainer, I find myself pressured
with a difficult decision...
